data.title: 国际服特别OST「Flower, Wind and You」
data.summary: [Shanhaijing Special OST – Flower, Wind and You MV Release] Sensei, Shanhaijing Special OST – Flower
data.body:
[Shanhaijing Special OST – Flower, Wind and You MV Release]

Sensei, Shanhaijing Special OST – Flower, Wind and You MV is now available in various channels!
Experience the spring breeze of Shanhaijing through this special OST!

🎵 MV: https://youtu.be/8jP2b6FOuVE
